notes: ASUP Offline Import (v3.7.0): import AutoSupport bundles (.7z, .tgz, .zip, .xml, .gz) onsite when Active IQ is unavailable. Parses ONTAP, StorageGRID, and E-Series bundles into ARIA normalized schema. Runs full Reference Library enrichment (CVE matching, EOA detection, upgrade path, 15-point readiness) from bundle data alone. Graceful degradation for partial/truncated bundles. Coverage report shows what was and wasn't parseable. Persisted in SQLite across sessions.
